objective:
Objectif: Développer une stratégie de trading crypto basée sur l'utilisation d'indicateurs novateurs et des entrées spécifiques pour explorer un comportement inattendu dans le marché, avec une attention particulière à la diversification.

Dans cette optique, nous proposons les indicateurs : BOLLINGER + EMA + PSAR, ainsi que l'entrée sur filtre horaire de liquidité (filtre horaire de volatilité) et le mode contre-consensus dans la fonction d'entrée. Pour notre objectif spécifique, nous choisissons les marchés : 0GUSDC en 1h.
Nous voulons éviter une formulation classique comme "RSI<30/RSI>70", et proposer plutôt des hypothèses testables et falsifiables pour notre objectif de stratégie.

iterations.hypothesis: The proposed strategy uses Bollinger bands and ATR with RSI to identify a trend reversal in the cryptocurrency market, taking advantage of volatility increases during this phase.

code.validation_error: [IND001] Usage invalide: indicators['bollinger']['period'] — sous-clé inconnue. Sous-clés valides: lower, middle, upper.
code.validation_error_retry: [SIG001] `for i in range(...)` interdit dans la logique Builder.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The proposed strategy uses Bollinger bands and ATR with RSI to identify trend reversal in cryptocurrency market. It exploits volatility increases during this phase by entering long when close price crosses over the upper Bollinger band, RSI is above 50 and ADX indicates a trending condition. Exit conditions are set at closing price crossing the middle Bollinger band or RSI dipping below oversold threshold or ADX dropping below low range. Hypothesis of trend reversal with specific conditions seems testable but it may not capture all aspects of market behavior.
[Backup plan] 1) If strategy doesn't perform well, consider adding other indicators like on balance volume (OBV), candlestick patterns and moving average convergence divergence (MACD). 2) If returns are negative, try scaling down the lot size or reducing leverage to minimize losses. 3) For mediocre performance with low Sharpe ratio, adjust parameters such as period for Bollinger bands, ADX range and RSI overbought/oversold thresholds.

iterations.hypothesis: Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

The proposed strategy aims to exploit market inefficiencies through the use of Bollinger Bands (BB), EMA and PSAR as entry signals, while also incorporating a filter for liquidity in the form of volatility-based filters. The strategy uses RSI and ADX to confirm trend direction and strength, respectively. ATR based risk management is incorporated with ATR-based stop loss below 1.5x ATR from entry price, and take profit at 3x ATR above entry price levels.
